keywords.competitor_gaps: No competitor has a dedicated 'etsy office wall art sizes' guide. Etsy market pages for 'office wall art digital downloads' exist but lack size guidance. YouTube video 'Printable Wall Art on Etsy SIZES & File Formats EXPLAINED' gets views but is generic — not office-specific. ShootingStarSVG covers general sizing but not office niche.
keywords.conversion_angle: Office/WFH wall art sellers need to cover both portrait (motivational quotes, 4:5 ratio) and landscape (wide desk-level art, 16:9/3:2) orientations simultaneously — exactly the multi-ratio problem SnapToSize solves in one upload. CTA: 'Upload once, get all office sizes instantly.'

sources.claim: Etsy market 'office wall art digital downloads' is active with many listings
YouTube guide on Etsy wall art sizes covers general use, not office-specific
Most popular sizes guide on Etsy shows demand for size education among sellers

keywords.competitor_gaps: Reddit thread (r/EtsySellers) confirms real seller confusion around bleed marks with 50+ comments. Primoprint blog covers bleed for Etsy but is a print-service sales page. Templett blog covers trim marks generally. No SnapToSize competitor has an Etsy-seller-specific bleed guide. Canva Help covers bleed but not in an Etsy context. This is a clear gap: high intent, no authoritative Etsy-focused guide exists.
keywords.conversion_angle: Bleed confusion stems from sellers managing multiple export settings per file and per size. SnapToSize eliminates this by auto-handling correct file dimensions — sellers upload one source file and get print-ready files for all sizes. Angle: 'Stop worrying about bleed — get print-ready files for every size automatically.' Links to free trial.

sources.claim: Etsy sellers actively ask about bleed marks on Reddit with significant engagement
Etsy market page for 'crop marks and bleed' products exists, showing demand
Primoprint covers print-ready files for Etsy, including bleed, as a print vendor
Canva's help docs cover bleed but not in an Etsy-seller-specific context
Templett covers trim marks generally for home prints
